title: Medal of Unity

The '''Medal of Unity''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilot medal awarded for successfully putting an end to the [[Sepan Civil War]] and bringing about renewed unity for the [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] and [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] peoples.

==Design==
The ribbon was primarily blue, with a red upside down triangle on top. The medal itself was primarily silver with gold linings and was molar-shaped. The center of the medal had the Imperial Crest prominently displayed in gold and blue.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
